case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. HECTOR V ROSALES

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSALES, HECTOR V $1,783.19 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,008.19, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 75801154) FILED BY PETITIONER DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION OF DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT HECOTR V ROSALES (TRANSACTION ID # 210053765) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
AFFIDAVIT OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL REGARDING INTEREST CALCULATION PURSUANT TO CCP 685.050 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 73483426) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT ROSALES, HECTOR V JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 75801154)
